task_completion.description: Assign Alice Johnson to the Security Audit task

task_completion.description: Set the assignment to use Rate Table B
task_completion.visual_evidence: A view or dialog (such as Assignment Information, Task Usage, or Resource Usage) shows the assignment of 'Alice Johnson' to 'Security Audit' with the 'Cost Rate Table' explicitly set to 'B'.

task_completion.description: Save the project as an XML file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog is visible showing the directory '/home/ga/Projects/' and the file name 'security_audit_costing.xml', or a terminal window shows the file being saved or verified at this path.

integrity.description: The agent used the ProjectLibre GUI to configure the rates and assignments

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to bypass GUI interactions
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing Python scripts or other command-line tools being used to modify the project file directly.

integrity.description: The save operation was performed through the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog belongs to the ProjectLibre application and is not a mock-up or a text editor save dialog.
